title: Do Not See Powder Snow
description: Now you can't see powder snow, game now harder and more realistic.
body: Make your game hard! There is no other texture for powder snow anymore! Leather boots now more helpfull.![See? Me not.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69b56a6d3dcaaca1168688664fd27ac35365e4dd.png)
